top_bullish: FirstCry-backed Swara Baby eyes filing for $100 million IPO this month
Sebi eyes market making framework for commodity derivatives to improve liquidity
Genxai Analytics IPO Day 3: GMP signals 5% listing gains; check subscription status and other details
top_bearish: Sensex snaps 2-day losing run, ends 395 points higher: 10 key highlights from Indian stock market today
SpaceX IPO: Can Indian investors buy stake in Elon Musk’s company in $75 billion public issue
Rupee appreciates 24 paise to open at 95.47 against US dollar

articles.title: Top Gainers & Losers on June 9: Gabriel India, OLA, Pine Labs, Bank of Baroda, Redington, Paytm among top gainers
articles.summary: The Indian stock market rebounded with gains led by financial stocks and a drop in crude oil prices. The Nifty and Sensex rose 0.61% and 0.55%, respectively. The RBI's new forex measures supported sentiment, but both indices still face significant year-to-date losses.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Sensex snaps 2-day losing run, ends 395 points higher: 10 key highlights from Indian stock market today
articles.summary: Helped by easing crude oil prices, pause in US-Iran hostilities and rally in bank stocks, India's key benchmark indices, Sensex and Nifty 50, snapped their two-day losing run on Tuesday, 9 June.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: FirstCry-backed Swara Baby eyes filing for $100 million IPO this month
articles.summary: The disposable hygiene products manufacturer, backed by FirstCry, is expected to file draft papers within 10-15 days. The issue will likely comprise fresh shares and an OFS.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sebi eyes market making framework for commodity derivatives to improve liquidity
articles.summary: Sebi is considering a market-making framework to boost liquidity in longer-dated commodity derivatives, helping businesses hedge future price risks more effectively. The move aims to reduce dependence on near-expiry contracts, improve price discovery and deepen India's commodity markets.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Genxai Analytics IPO Day 3: GMP signals 5% listing gains; check subscription status and other details
articles.summary: Genxai Analytics IPO, closing today, has received strong investor interest. The ₹55 crore offering includes 0.47 crore shares priced between ₹110 and ₹116, mainly targeting working capital and development expenses.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: SpaceX IPO: Can Indian investors buy stake in Elon Musk’s company in $75 billion public issue
articles.summary: SpaceX is debuting on Nasdaq on 12 June with shares priced at $135, potentially raising $75 billion. Up to 25% of shares could go to retail investors, but direct access may be restricted for investors from several countries, including India.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Top defence stocks to buy now: HAL, Zen Technologies, Bharat Electronics, Apollo Micro in Choice Broking’s list
articles.summary: According to Choice Institutional Equities, India's defence sector is poised for growth with robust order books and increasing local production. Key companies such as HAL, BEL, and Zen Technologies are well-positioned to benefit from military preparedness and government support.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: JNK India shares surge over 17% to 15-month high after securing international order
articles.summary: JNK India shares surged 17.22% to ₹489.40 after winning a significant order from CC7 Emirates Engineering for waste gas handling systems. The contract, categorized as large, is estimated between ₹100 crore and ₹300 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Copper Resumes Gains as Mideast Tensions Ease, Stocks Rebound
articles.summary: Copper resumed its advance along with other industrial metals as tensions eased in the Middle East, boosting risk appetite.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Unichem may finally start paying off for Ipca Laboratories
articles.summary: Ipca stock’s valuation seem reasonable relative to its earnings potential over the next few years. They trade at around 30 times its FY27 estimated earnings
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Adani Energy Solutions to acquire IntelliSmart for ₹3,050 crore
articles.summary: Adani Energy Solutions share price has gained 16% in one month, and has rallied 60% in three months. The Adani Group stock has jumped 74% in one year, while it has surged 89% over the past three years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: UHM Vacation IPO allotment finalised: Latest GMP, steps-by-step guide to check allotment status online for SME IPO
articles.summary: The UHM Vacation IPO was open for subscription from June 4-8, 2025, and is set for allotment today. Shares are anticipated to list on June 11 at around ₹166. Subscription was 2.36 times, with retail bids at 3.86 times.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stocks to buy: Arvind, Nitin Spinners, Sanathan Textiles - Emkay bullish on three textile stocks
articles.summary: Stocks to buy: Emkay Global initiated coverage on three textiles sector with a ‘Buy’ rating - Arvind, Nitin Spinners, and Sanathan Textiles.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: IndiGo share price jumps over 4% after brokerages maintain bullish view on the aviation stock
articles.summary: InterGlobe Aviation shares rose over 4% on 9 June after brokerages endorsed a positive outlook following its Investor Day. Analysts focus on IndiGo's long-term growth strategies, including ambitious passenger and fleet expansion targets for FY30, despite short-term challenges like rising fuel costs.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard to GRSE: Defence Shipbuilding stocks rise amid multi-year growth forecast
articles.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders gained over 2% to hit the day's peak of ₹2,666.60 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE). Mazagon Dock also added over 2% to ₹2,442.50, and Cochin Shipyard added 1.8% to ₹1,432.60 apiece.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: CMR Green Technologies IPO listing tomorrow: What GMP signals ahead of market debut
articles.summary: CMR Green Technologies, a leader in aluminium and zinc recycling, launched a ₹630.88 crore IPO, which was oversubscribed 127.07 times. The shares are scheduled to debut on June 10, with a potential listing price of ₹262, reflecting strong investor demand.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online for SME IPO
articles.summary: Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment date is likely today, June 9. Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment status online check can be done through the websites of BSE and the IPO registrar. Kfin Technologies is the Vahh Chemicals IPO registrar.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Is the global IT stock rout a wake-up call for AI optimists?
articles.summary: Investors are wondering how long it will take for AI-related investments to convert into substantial IT revenue growth and whether large global IT stocks are overvalued.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bonus share alert! Hardwyn India announces 2:5 bonus issue, record date awaited - small-cap stock jumps 2%
articles.summary: Hardwyn India plans a 2:5 bonus share issue, pending shareholder approval at an upcoming EGM. The company aims to issue around 19.54 crore shares. The record date for determining shareholder eligibility for the 2:5 bonus issue has not yet been announced.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: ICICI Bank pips Reliance Industries to become second-largest weighted stock in Nifty 50 despite smaller market cap
articles.summary: Reliance Industries commands the highest overall market capitalisation of nearly ₹17.14 lakh crore on the NSE, its free-float market capitalisation stands at a little over ₹8.52 lakh crore. As a result, the company currently holds an 8.27% weight in the Nifty 50 index.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Copper Falls With Rate Hike Prospects, AI Stocks Risk in Focus
articles.summary: Copper declined as expectations for a US rate hike and risks around artificial intelligence stocks reduced appetite for industrial metals.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Hexagon Nutrition IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 10.98x so far. Check GMP, issue details, key dates. Apply or not?
articles.summary: The Hexagon Nutrition IPO, open from June 5 to June 9, saw strong demand, with 10.98x subscription by day 3. The price band is set at ₹42-45, and the offering is valued at ₹138.87 crore, mostly as an offer-for-sale.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: IDFC First Bank to ICICI Bank, SBI: Nifty Bank jumps over 1% as RBI swap facility lifts bank shares
articles.summary: The RBI's new swap facility aims to lower hedging costs for banks on foreign borrowings, enhancing liquidity. Despite recent gains, analysts suggest caution as the Bank Nifty remains volatile within a broad trading range.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: 690% rally in 5 years! Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on this multibagger stock, sees 30% upside
articles.summary: Multibagger Gabriel India has offered solid returns to investors over different time frames. According to BSE data, Gabriel India share price has jumped 60% in a year, 165% in two years, 690% in five years and 1040% in 10 years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Multibagger defence stock Apollo Micro Systems close to record high. Do you own?
articles.summary: Apollo Micro Systems rose over 2% on 9 June after announcing the trading approval of 13,000 newly allotted shares. The company also reported strong Q4FY26 earnings, with net profit of ₹38 crore and year-on-year revenue growth of 81%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vodafone Idea share price jumps over 3% after Bombay High Court relief on spectrum charges
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea share price has gained 30% in one month, and has rallied 47% in three months. The telecom stock has surged 36% in six months, while it has jumped 106% in one year.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Small-cap stock BlueStone Jewellery share price falls 6.5% as investors offload stake worth ₹300 crore via block deal
articles.summary: BlueStone Jewellery share price falls 6.5% asinvestors sell stake via block deal. The floor price for the transaction was fixed at ₹520 per share, implying a discount of around 5.4% to Bluestone's closing price of ₹549.50 on the NSE on June 8, 2026.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: RVNL share price gains over 3% after order win, breaks 9-day losing run
articles.summary: RVNL share price has fallen over 23% in one month, and has declined 15% in three months. The railway PSU stock has dropped 35% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis, while it has plunged 45% in one year.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Rupee appreciates 24 paise to open at 95.47 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee rose 24 paise to 95.47 against the US dollar, aided by falling crude prices after Iran and Israel paused hostilities. The RBI's new measures aim to boost foreign currency inflows and stabilize the rupee, which has weakened nearly 8% this year.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Silver price today down 1% to ₹2.43 lakh as bond yields rise, Fed rate hike fears return despite Israel-Iran ceasefire
articles.summary: Silver prices fell to ₹2.43 lakh per kg as rising US Treasury yields and Federal Reserve rate hike expectations overshadowed easing geopolitical tensions. Investors remain cautious ahead of US inflation data, which may influence silver's near-term direction.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Zepto IPO: Quick commerce firm files updated DRHP, aims to raise ₹8,010 crore
articles.summary: Zepto has filed an updated draft red herring prospectus with SEBI for its IPO, including a fresh share issue of ₹8,010 crore and an OFS of 113 million shares. The company aims for a July stock market debut, following approval from SEBI in May.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold rate today: MCX gold price falls below ₹1.55 lakh per 10 grams, silver rate slips 1%; What’s the strategy ahead?
articles.summary: Gold rate today: Gold prices steadied in the international market amid a fragile ceasefire between Israel and Iran, while investors await signs of progress in the broader Middle East conflict, with concerns over inflation and interest rate hikes in focus.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: NLC India OFS: Navratna PSU stock falls 5% as govt to sell 3% stake - Check floor price, key dates, and other details
articles.summary: The government has initiated an Offer for Sale (OFS) of up to 3% in NLC India Ltd, including a green shoe option. The floor price is set at ₹303 per share. This follows successful stake sales in other companies and is part of the ongoing disinvestment program in FY27.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty trades flat, Vaishali Parekh recommends three intraday stocks for today — 9 June 2026
articles.summary: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty trades flat, Vaishali Parekh recommends three intraday stocks for today —RVNL, Vedanta, and IndiGo
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: World Cup Season Spurs Citi’s Bearish Call on Rates Volatility
articles.summary: Traders may have another reason to worry less about bond volatility spiking this summer: the FIFA World Cup.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India's growth silver linings face war and drought clouds
articles.summary: India’s economy ended FY26 with a strong 7.7% GDP growth driven by healthy agricultural activity and likely private investments, but FY27 faces risks on all these fronts from inflation and a below-normal monsoon.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Oil prices ease after Israel, Iran halt attacks; markets eye ceasefire
articles.summary: Brent and WTI edged lower after Israel and Iran paused attacks, easing immediate supply concerns and offering potential relief to oil-importing economies such as India.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Solar sector feels the heat as cost spike threatens project economics
articles.summary: A surge in the prices of metals and petrochemical inputs linked to the West Asia war has pushed up costs for India's solar power sector by around 20%. The rise, including a 30-35% increase in solar cell prices, could hit developers’ returns and increase their financing costs for projects.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Focus on domestic economy as India buffeted by headwinds, says senior official
articles.summary: Despite rising crude oil prices due to the Iran war, India remains focused on domestic growth, says a senior government functionary. GST collections show strength, and recent RBI reforms aim to enhance foreign investment in government securities.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Why India Inc's rising profit share in GDP will be tough to sustain in FY27
articles.summary: Driven by rising earnings, the profit-to-GDP ratio for the BSE 500 universe reached 4.3% in FY26. However, looming global tensions and softening consumption indicators threaten to halt further expansion of this corporate profit share.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India posts 0.7% current account surplus in March quarter
articles.summary: The March-quarter surplus marked a reversal from the $13.2 billion deficit recorded in the preceding quarter, even as foreign portfolio outflows remain elevated.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: How the government hit its FY26 deficit target despite a subsidy surge
articles.summary: Higher subsidies and lower receipts complicated the Centre's fiscal math in FY26. Yet, it met its deficit target for FY26. Mint breaks down the math.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Crude price fears won't derail economy: PM-EAC's Neelkanth Mishra says India can grow over 8% amid West Asia tensions
articles.summary: India's economic growth remains resilient despite rising crude oil prices, as per Neelkanth Mishra of the PM-EAC. He highlights India's strong position to manage oil costs and predicts growth over 8% by early 2026.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India’s milk output to grow 6% in FY27 despite weak monsoon risks
articles.summary: Higher milk output is expected on the back of an increase in livestock population, better breeding, veterinary care, and expansion of dairy infrastructure through the addition of nearly 75,000 new dairy cooperatives.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Govt is changing the way you buy cooking oil — standard pack sizes will now help shoppers compare prices
articles.summary: The order targets a common pricing tactic in the world's most populous nation, where oils sold in odd, non-standard sizes leave buyers unable to tell which brand offers the best value for the kitchen staple.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: The move into gold by other nations has happened before. It’s bad news for US dollar
articles.summary: The recent shift from U.S. assets to gold mirrors 1971, when central banks dumped dollars before President Nixon ended gold convertibility.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: The week in charts: deficit concerns, IIP reset, India’s wedding dreams
articles.summary: In this weekly Plain Facts compilation, we present to you data-based insights, with easy-to-read charts, to help you delve deeper into the stories reported by Mint in the week gone by.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Solar power curtailment raises red flags for renewable investors
articles.summary: The solar capacity that was curtailed on 1 May equals almost one-sixth of the country’s installed capacity of 150GW. Experts said that low demand due to industries closing for Labour Day on 1 May may have contributed to the curtailment.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India targets near fourfold jump in fisheries exports to $30 billion in 5 years
articles.summary: Commerce minister Piyush Goyal noted that seafood exports rose from around $5 billion in 2013-14 to about $8.5 billion in FY26, while global fisheries trade increased from $150 billion to $164 billion during the same period.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India posts 7.7% GDP growth in FY26, lifted by strong March quarter
articles.summary: Despite the quarterly moderation, the annual figure came in slightly above market expectations for a 7.6% expansion, cushioned by a stronger-than-anticipated January-March performance. The economy had grown 7.1% in 2024-25.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: ‘So what? 100 is just a number’: PM Modi's EAC member dismisses alarm over rupee’s potential fall to triple digits
articles.summary: Shamika Ravi, a member of the PM's Economic Advisory Council, downplays concerns about the Indian rupee reaching 100 against USD, stating it's just a number. She emphasised managing the economic impact of global supply shocks over exchange rate defence.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India GDP Highlights: Q4FY26 GDP at 7.8%, real GDP growth at 7.7%, says govt
articles.summary: India GDP Highlights: MoSPI releases Q4 FY26 and annual GDP data shortly. Track growth rate, sector performance, comparison with estimates, RBI outlook, and market reaction.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: RBI, govt unveil measures to attract foreign inflows in bonds, equities
articles.summary: The RBI and government delivered on a coordinated effort towards shoring up capital flows into Indian assets to ease the pressure on the rupee, experts said
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: RBI MPC outcome: Central bank slashes FY27 growth projections to 6.6% amid Middle East crisis
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) in its June policy meeting on Friday lowered its growth projections for the financial year 2026-27 (FY27) to 6.6% from 6.9% earlier amid the Middle East crisis and elevated crude oil prices along with disruptions to the Southwest monsoon.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: War and weather force RBI into a wait-and-watch mode as risks to growth, inflation loom
articles.summary: RBI has trimmed its real GDP growth forecast for FY27 to 6.6% from 6.9% earlier this year, while raising its retail inflation outlook to 5.1% from 4.6%.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil rises as Hezbollah rejects ceasefire, raising fresh fears over West Asia peace
articles.summary: Oil prices rose after Hezbollah rejected a US-brokered Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, reviving concerns over wider regional tensions and their impact on global energy supplies.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Centre plans to allow PE firms, sovereign wealth funds to directly participate in all greenfield infra projects
articles.summary: The Centre is planning to introduce a new public-private partnership framework to allow PE firms, pension funds, sovereign wealth funds and other large financial investors to directly participate in greenfield project development across sectors like power, railways, airports.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Govt nears a quarter of ₹80,000-cr asset-sale target for FY27
articles.summary: The government has raised ₹6,366.93 crore through land monetisation via Infrastructure Investment Trusts (InvITs), while stake sales in Central Bank of India and Coal India fetched another ₹7,808.49 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India remains among fastest-growing economies despite global uncertainty: Minister Prasada
articles.summary: The minister highlighted India's push in trade, manufacturing, AI and semiconductors at IIFT's Global Business Research Conference.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: All nine recent FTAs set to be operationalized within 10 months, says Goyal
articles.summary: India expects the nine FTAs signed over the past three years to be operational within 9-10 months. Minister Goyal says these agreements complement India's growth strategy by expanding market access, facilitating trade an industry, enabling movement of talent and attracting investments.
articles.label: BULLISH
